query:
INSERT INTO countries (name, code, isActive) VALUES 
('Saudi Arabia', 'SA', 1),
('United Arab Emirates', 'AE', 1),
('Qatar', 'QA', 1),
('Kuwait', 'KW', 1),
('Bahrain', 'BH', 1),
('Oman', 'OM', 1)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name);
